verse_text: All things are lawful for me, but not all things are helpful; all things are lawful for me, but not all things edify.

links.context: The Passover under Josiah and the account of his death (vv. 26-31). Josiah was the last king of Judah to seek truth (v. 21). As such, he is a figure of Christ, who is the embodiment of truth ([[JOH.14:6]]). From Exodus 12 we learn that the Feast of the Passover is an OT type of the NT paschal feast ([[1CO.10:23]]-26), in which the Church celebrates the death and Resurrection of Christ.
